# Image Generation Prompt Templates

## Discord Bot Use Cases

### Profile Picture / Avatar Generator
```
[style], anime portrait, [subject description], detailed face, expressive eyes,
solo, upper body, neutral or gradient background, soft lighting, high quality
```

### Server Banner
```
wide panoramic landscape, [theme: e.g. futuristic city / fantasy forest / cyberpunk],
vibrant colors, no text, no watermarks, 16:9 ratio, cinematic lighting, ultra detailed
```

### Welcome Card Background
```
abstract background, [server theme colors], gradient overlay,
dark aesthetic, no faces, bokeh, soft blur, suitable for text overlay
```

### Emoji / Server Icon
```
simple [emoji concept] icon, flat design, centered on white background,
circle crop ready, bold clean lines, colorful, no text, no complexity
```

### Achievement Cards
```
trophy / achievement card background, [style: gaming / medieval / futuristic],
ornate border design, gold and [accent color], no text area left blank
```

## Style Presets

### Cyberpunk / Tech
```
cyberpunk aesthetic, neon lights, dark background, purple and cyan color scheme,
holographic elements, sci-fi atmosphere, ultra detailed
```

### Cozy / Aesthetic
```
cozy aesthetic, warm lighting, pastel colors, soft focus, studio ghibli inspired,
peaceful atmosphere, detailed environment
```

### Dark Fantasy
```
dark fantasy art, dramatic lighting, moody atmosphere, intricate details,
fantasy elements, high contrast, cinematic quality
```

### Minimal / Clean
```
minimalist design, clean lines, single accent color, white or dark background,
modern aesthetic, simple composition, professional
```

### Pixel Art
```
pixel art, 32x32 style, retro game aesthetic, limited color palette,
crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing, classic video game style
```

## Negative Prompts by Context

### General Quality
```
blurry, low quality, bad anatomy, watermark, text, logo, signature,
deformed, ugly, pixelated, oversaturated
```

### Portrait/Avatar
```
multiple people, extra limbs, distorted face, unrealistic proportions,
bad hands, missing fingers, crossed eyes
```

### Landscape
```
people, portraits, text overlay, watermarks, grid lines, UI elements
```
